payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. Closing condition met: the cross-process flake is fixed (advisory-locked, steady-state-DDL-free ensureSchema/ensureAuthSchema/ensureRls) and the full suite passed 3 CONSECUTIVE clean runs with SCOPE_PG_URL set: 290/290, 0 skipped, each run. Coverage: two-user isolation incl. RLS at the SQL layer, invite grant flow, viewer-cannot-write role gates, tenant+role-scoped sync, actor authz + aliases, gossip convergence.
